历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 30263 → 26651 → 50299 (gap in 2023) → 40338 → 38612. Excluding the 2023 gap value, the ranking fluctuated within the 38000–41000 range in the past three years, with a baseline ranking of about 38612 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 35 in 2021 → 37 in 2022 → 38 in 2023 → 42 in 2024 → 40 in 2025 → 38 in 2026. In 2026, enrollment decreased by 5% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has continuously risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, a leap of 50 places, significantly enhancing its comprehensive strength and brand influence. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a recruitment announcement controversy. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, with an evaluation of 'average'. There are no abnormal records for admission cutoffs, and negative public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. Plant Protection is an A- discipline, which has some correlation with the Food Science and Engineering category (including Brewing Engineering) among the Physics Category enrollment majors. The remaining enrollment majors do not have corresponding disciplines rated A- or above.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors include highly recommended popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Electrical Engineering, with high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, with an estimated 313,000 in the Physics Category, slightly lower than in 2025. The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 was 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the baseline ranking of 38612 in 2025, a slight enrollment reduction of 5% in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity pointing to a forward shift in ranking), a significant rise in the Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), and high popularity of hot majors (attracting more candidates), the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 37504, with a range of 37004–38004.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 37004–38004, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Materials, Chemistry, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Public Administration, English) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<37004), one can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
